prompt: Photorealistic commercial vehicle photography. A matte black Mercedes Sprinter van parked at a premium Adelaide construction site. On the side panel is a logo featuring a dark charcoal pentagon shape — specifically a rectangle where only the top-right corner has been sliced off at a 45-degree diagonal, creating a distinctive five-sided shape (flat bottom, flat left side, flat top until three-quarters across, then a diagonal cut down to the right side, flat right side). Inside this dark pentagon shape, the letters LK appear in gold (#C9A96E) elegant serif font, as if carved into stone. A thin gold horizontal line near the bottom inside the shape. Below the pentagon shape, small refined capitals read DESIGN AND BUILD with generous letter-spacing. The solid pentagon shape is clearly visible as a distinctive graphic element against the matte black van body. Modern building under construction in background. Shot on 35mm f/4 lens, overcast Adelaide light, cinematic, professional fleet branding, premium construction company.
negative_prompt: hexagon, diamond, circle, octagon, symmetrical shape, plain rectangle, cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright neon, cluttered, plastic, low quality, amateur, watermark, stock photo, illustration, 3D render, dirty vehicle
